/**
 * Generated by orval v8.5.3 🍺
 * Do not edit manually.
 * Api
 * Duat Geodia API - SYNTHETIC_ONLY local-first simulation lab
 * OpenAPI spec version: 0.1.0
 */
import { useMutation, useQuery } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import type {
  MutationFunction,
  QueryFunction,
  QueryKey,
  UseMutationOptions,
  UseMutationResult,
  UseQueryOptions,
  UseQueryResult,
} from "@tanstack/react-query";

import type {
  AppendWitnessEventBody,
  GenesisConfig,
  GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
  HandoffArtifact,
  HealthStatus,
  ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
  ListWitnessEventsParams,
  SaveGenesisConfigBody,
  SaveHandoffBody,
  SaveSimulationSnapshotBody,
  SimulationSnapshot,
  WitnessEvent,
} from "./api.schemas";

import { customFetch } from "../custom-fetch";
import type { ErrorType, BodyType } from "../custom-fetch";

type AwaitedInput<T> = PromiseLike<T> | T;

type Awaited<O> = O extends AwaitedInput<infer T> ? T : never;

type SecondParameter<T extends (...args: never) => unknown> = Parameters<T>[1];

/**
 * @summary Health check
 */
export const getHealthCheckUrl = () => {
  return `/api/healthz`;
};

export const healthCheck = async (
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<HealthStatus> => {
  return customFetch<HealthStatus>(getHealthCheckUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getHealthCheckQueryKey = () => {
  return [`/api/healthz`] as const;
};

export const getHealthCheckQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey = queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getHealthCheckQueryKey();

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>> = ({
    signal,
  }) => healthCheck({ signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type HealthCheckQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>
>;
export type HealthCheckQueryError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Health check
 */

export function useHealthCheck<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof healthCheck>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getHealthCheckQueryOptions(options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary List all WitnessLog events (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */
export const getListWitnessEventsUrl = (params?: ListWitnessEventsParams) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? "null" : value.toString());
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0
    ? `/api/witness?${stringifiedParams}`
    : `/api/witness`;
};

export const listWitnessEvents = async (
  params?: ListWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<WitnessEvent[]> => {
  return customFetch<WitnessEvent[]>(getListWitnessEventsUrl(params), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getListWitnessEventsQueryKey = (
  params?: ListWitnessEventsParams,
) => {
  return [`/api/witness`, ...(params ? [params] : [])] as const;
};

export const getListWitnessEventsQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: ListWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =
    queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getListWitnessEventsQueryKey(params);

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>
  > = ({ signal }) => listWitnessEvents(params, { signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type ListWitnessEventsQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>
>;
export type ListWitnessEventsQueryError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary List all WitnessLog events (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */

export function useListWitnessEvents<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: ListWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listWitnessEvents>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getListWitnessEventsQueryOptions(params, options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary Append a new WitnessLog event
 */
export const getAppendWitnessEventUrl = () => {
  return `/api/witness`;
};

export const appendWitnessEvent = async (
  appendWitnessEventBody: AppendWitnessEventBody,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<WitnessEvent> => {
  return customFetch<WitnessEvent>(getAppendWitnessEventUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(appendWitnessEventBody),
  });
};

export const getAppendWitnessEventMutationOptions = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationOptions<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  const mutationKey = ["appendWitnessEvent"];
  const { mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions } = options
    ? options.mutation &&
      "mutationKey" in options.mutation &&
      options.mutation.mutationKey
      ? options
      : { ...options, mutation: { ...options.mutation, mutationKey } }
    : { mutation: { mutationKey }, request: undefined };

  const mutationFn: MutationFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>,
    { data: BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody> }
  > = (props) => {
    const { data } = props ?? {};

    return appendWitnessEvent(data, requestOptions);
  };

  return { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions };
};

export type AppendWitnessEventMutationResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>
>;
export type AppendWitnessEventMutationBody = BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody>;
export type AppendWitnessEventMutationError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Append a new WitnessLog event
 */
export const useAppendWitnessEvent = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationResult<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof appendWitnessEvent>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<AppendWitnessEventBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  return useMutation(getAppendWitnessEventMutationOptions(options));
};

/**
 * @summary Get last N witness events for live ticker
 */
export const getGetRecentWitnessEventsUrl = (
  params?: GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? "null" : value.toString());
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0
    ? `/api/witness/recent?${stringifiedParams}`
    : `/api/witness/recent`;
};

export const getRecentWitnessEvents = async (
  params?: GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<WitnessEvent[]> => {
  return customFetch<WitnessEvent[]>(getGetRecentWitnessEventsUrl(params), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getGetRecentWitnessEventsQueryKey = (
  params?: GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
) => {
  return [`/api/witness/recent`, ...(params ? [params] : [])] as const;
};

export const getGetRecentWitnessEventsQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =
    queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getGetRecentWitnessEventsQueryKey(params);

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>
  > = ({ signal }) =>
    getRecentWitnessEvents(params, { signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type GetRecentWitnessEventsQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>
>;
export type GetRecentWitnessEventsQueryError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Get last N witness events for live ticker
 */

export function useGetRecentWitnessEvents<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: GetRecentWitnessEventsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getRecentWitnessEvents>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getGetRecentWitnessEventsQueryOptions(params, options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary List saved handoff artifacts

export const getListHandoffsUrl = () => {
  return `/api/handoff`;
};

export const listHandoffs = async (
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<HandoffArtifact[]> => {
  return customFetch<HandoffArtifact[]>(getListHandoffsUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getListHandoffsQueryKey = () => {
  return [`/api/handoff`] as const;
};

export const getListHandoffsQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey = queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getListHandoffsQueryKey();

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>> = ({
    signal,
  }) => listHandoffs({ signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type ListHandoffsQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>

export type ListHandoffsQueryError = ErrorType<unknown>;

export function useListHandoffs<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listHandoffs>>,
    TError,
    TData

  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };

/**
 * @summary Save a new handoff artifact
 */
export const getSaveHandoffUrl = () => {
  return `/api/handoff`;
};

export const saveHandoff = async (
  saveHandoffBody: SaveHandoffBody,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<HandoffArtifact> => {
  return customFetch<HandoffArtifact>(getSaveHandoffUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(saveHandoffBody),
  });
};

export const getSaveHandoffMutationOptions = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveHandoffBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationOptions<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveHandoffBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  const mutationKey = ["saveHandoff"];
  const { mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions } = options
    ? options.mutation &&
      "mutationKey" in options.mutation &&
      options.mutation.mutationKey
      ? options
      : { ...options, mutation: { ...options.mutation, mutationKey } }
    : { mutation: { mutationKey }, request: undefined };

  const mutationFn: MutationFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>,
    { data: BodyType<SaveHandoffBody> }
  > = (props) => {
    const { data } = props ?? {};

    return saveHandoff(data, requestOptions);
  };

  return { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions };
};

export type SaveHandoffMutationResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>
>;
export type SaveHandoffMutationBody = BodyType<SaveHandoffBody>;
export type SaveHandoffMutationError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Save a new handoff artifact
 */
export const useSaveHandoff = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveHandoffBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationResult<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveHandoff>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveHandoffBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  return useMutation(getSaveHandoffMutationOptions(options));
};

/**
 * @summary Get a specific handoff artifact
 */
export const getGetHandoffUrl = (id: number) => {
  return `/api/handoff/${id}`;
};

export const getHandoff = async (
  id: number,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<HandoffArtifact> => {
  return customFetch<HandoffArtifact>(getGetHandoffUrl(id), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getGetHandoffQueryKey = (id: number) => {
  return [`/api/handoff/${id}`] as const;
};

export const getGetHandoffQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>,
  TError = ErrorType<void>,
>(
  id: number,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey = queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getGetHandoffQueryKey(id);

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>> = ({
    signal,
  }) => getHandoff(id, { signal, ...requestOptions });

  return {
    queryKey,
    queryFn,
    enabled: !!id,
    ...queryOptions,
  } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type GetHandoffQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>
>;
export type GetHandoffQueryError = ErrorType<void>;

/**
 * @summary Get a specific handoff artifact
 */

export function useGetHandoff<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>,
  TError = ErrorType<void>,
>(
  id: number,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getHandoff>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getGetHandoffQueryOptions(id, options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary Get current Duat Genesis configuration
 */
export const getGetGenesisConfigUrl = () => {
  return `/api/genesis`;
};

export const getGenesisConfig = async (
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<GenesisConfig> => {
  return customFetch<GenesisConfig>(getGetGenesisConfigUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getGetGenesisConfigQueryKey = () => {
  return [`/api/genesis`] as const;
};

export const getGetGenesisConfigQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey = queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getGetGenesisConfigQueryKey();

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>
  > = ({ signal }) => getGenesisConfig({ signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type GetGenesisConfigQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>

  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getGenesisConfig>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getGetGenesisConfigQueryOptions(options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary Save a genesis configuration snapshot
 */
export const getSaveGenesisConfigUrl = () => {
  return `/api/genesis`;
};

export const saveGenesisConfig = async (
  saveGenesisConfigBody: SaveGenesisConfigBody,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<GenesisConfig> => {
  return customFetch<GenesisConfig>(getSaveGenesisConfigUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(saveGenesisConfigBody),
  });
};

export const getSaveGenesisConfigMutationOptions = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationOptions<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  const mutationKey = ["saveGenesisConfig"];
  const { mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions } = options
    ? options.mutation &&
      "mutationKey" in options.mutation &&
      options.mutation.mutationKey
      ? options
      : { ...options, mutation: { ...options.mutation, mutationKey } }
    : { mutation: { mutationKey }, request: undefined };

  const mutationFn: MutationFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>,
    { data: BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody> }
  > = (props) => {
    const { data } = props ?? {};

    return saveGenesisConfig(data, requestOptions);
  };

  return { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions };
};

export type SaveGenesisConfigMutationResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>
>;
export type SaveGenesisConfigMutationBody = BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody>;
export type SaveGenesisConfigMutationError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Save a genesis configuration snapshot
 */
export const useSaveGenesisConfig = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationResult<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveGenesisConfig>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveGenesisConfigBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  return useMutation(getSaveGenesisConfigMutationOptions(options));
};

/**
 * @summary List simulation state snapshots
 */
export const getListSimulationSnapshotsUrl = (
  params?: ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
) => {
  const normalizedParams = new URLSearchParams();

  Object.entries(params || {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value !== undefined) {
      normalizedParams.append(key, value === null ? "null" : value.toString());
    }
  });

  const stringifiedParams = normalizedParams.toString();

  return stringifiedParams.length > 0
    ? `/api/simulation/snapshots?${stringifiedParams}`
    : `/api/simulation/snapshots`;
};

export const listSimulationSnapshots = async (
  params?: ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<SimulationSnapshot[]> => {
  return customFetch<SimulationSnapshot[]>(
    getListSimulationSnapshotsUrl(params),
    {
      ...options,
      method: "GET",
    },
  );
};

export const getListSimulationSnapshotsQueryKey = (
  params?: ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
) => {
  return [`/api/simulation/snapshots`, ...(params ? [params] : [])] as const;
};

export const getListSimulationSnapshotsQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =
    queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getListSimulationSnapshotsQueryKey(params);

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>
  > = ({ signal }) =>
    listSimulationSnapshots(params, { signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type ListSimulationSnapshotsQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>
>;
export type ListSimulationSnapshotsQueryError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary List simulation state snapshots
 */

export function useListSimulationSnapshots<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>,
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
>(
  params?: ListSimulationSnapshotsParams,
  options?: {
    query?: UseQueryOptions<
      Awaited<ReturnType<typeof listSimulationSnapshots>>,
      TError,
      TData
    >;
    request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
  },
): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getListSimulationSnapshotsQueryOptions(params, options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}

/**
 * @summary Save a synthetic simulation snapshot (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */
export const getSaveSimulationSnapshotUrl = () => {
  return `/api/simulation/snapshots`;
};

export const saveSimulationSnapshot = async (
  saveSimulationSnapshotBody: SaveSimulationSnapshotBody,
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<SimulationSnapshot> => {
  return customFetch<SimulationSnapshot>(getSaveSimulationSnapshotUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...options?.headers },
    body: JSON.stringify(saveSimulationSnapshotBody),
  });
};

export const getSaveSimulationSnapshotMutationOptions = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationOptions<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  const mutationKey = ["saveSimulationSnapshot"];
  const { mutation: mutationOptions, request: requestOptions } = options
    ? options.mutation &&
      "mutationKey" in options.mutation &&
      options.mutation.mutationKey
      ? options
      : { ...options, mutation: { ...options.mutation, mutationKey } }
    : { mutation: { mutationKey }, request: undefined };

  const mutationFn: MutationFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>,
    { data: BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody> }
  > = (props) => {
    const { data } = props ?? {};

    return saveSimulationSnapshot(data, requestOptions);
  };

  return { mutationFn, ...mutationOptions };
};

export type SaveSimulationSnapshotMutationResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>
>;
export type SaveSimulationSnapshotMutationBody =
  BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody>;
export type SaveSimulationSnapshotMutationError = ErrorType<unknown>;

/**
 * @summary Save a synthetic simulation snapshot (SYNTHETIC_ONLY)
 */
export const useSaveSimulationSnapshot = <
  TError = ErrorType<unknown>,
  TContext = unknown,
>(options?: {
  mutation?: UseMutationOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>,
    TError,
    { data: BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody> },
    TContext
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseMutationResult<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof saveSimulationSnapshot>>,
  TError,
  { data: BodyType<SaveSimulationSnapshotBody> },
  TContext
> => {
  return useMutation(getSaveSimulationSnapshotMutationOptions(options));
};

/**
 * @summary Get the most recent simulation snapshot
 */
export const getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotUrl = () => {
  return `/api/simulation/snapshots/latest`;
};

export const getLatestSimulationSnapshot = async (
  options?: RequestInit,
): Promise<SimulationSnapshot> => {
  return customFetch<SimulationSnapshot>(getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotUrl(), {
    ...options,
    method: "GET",
  });
};

export const getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryKey = () => {
  return [`/api/simulation/snapshots/latest`] as const;
};

export const getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryOptions = <
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>,
  TError = ErrorType<void>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}) => {
  const { query: queryOptions, request: requestOptions } = options ?? {};

  const queryKey =
    queryOptions?.queryKey ?? getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryKey();

  const queryFn: QueryFunction<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>
  > = ({ signal }) =>
    getLatestSimulationSnapshot({ signal, ...requestOptions });

  return { queryKey, queryFn, ...queryOptions } as UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>,
    TError,
    TData
  > & { queryKey: QueryKey };
};

export type GetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryResult = NonNullable<
  Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>
>;
export type GetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryError = ErrorType<void>;

/**
 * @summary Get the most recent simulation snapshot
 */

export function useGetLatestSimulationSnapshot<
  TData = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>,
  TError = ErrorType<void>,
>(options?: {
  query?: UseQueryOptions<
    Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getLatestSimulationSnapshot>>,
    TError,
    TData
  >;
  request?: SecondParameter<typeof customFetch>;
}): UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & { queryKey: QueryKey } {
  const queryOptions = getGetLatestSimulationSnapshotQueryOptions(options);

  const query = useQuery(queryOptions) as UseQueryResult<TData, TError> & {
    queryKey: QueryKey;
  };

  return { ...query, queryKey: queryOptions.queryKey };
}
